## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Followed Conventional Commits in the branch + commits
- [ ] No `.env`, no Supabase URLs, no Groq keys committed
- [ ] No unrelated formatting churn
- [ ] If new dependency added: justified in the PR body
- [ ] If touching `src/lib/`: added or updated a test
- [ ] If UI change: manually walked the [verification flow](docs/VERIFICATION.md)
